title: StarCraft Brood War annual player prize winnings, global top 10 by year
metric: Annual tournament prize winnings, USD, not salary or streaming/sponsorship income
source: Liquipedia StarCraft Brood War Wiki Winnings/YYYY pages; references note all amounts are in USD
notes: This dataset uses public tournament prize winnings as a salary proxy because player salaries and private contracts are not generally public.
Rows in the race-video file are zero-filled when a player is outside the global top 10 for that year; zero does not mean the player earned no prize money overall.
2026 is year-to-date / partial as of the source page fetch date.
